glosses.ja: 提供する; 申し出る

translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी मदद कर सकता हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular, present indicative; selects the infinitive 'anbieten'.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular informal, dative; indirect object/recipient.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object/theme of 'anbieten'.
Main verb, infinitive; separable verb ('an-' + 'bieten'), attached in infinitive and placed clause-final under a modal.

sentences.target: Wir möchten Kaffee und Tee anbieten.

translations.de: Wir möchten Kaffee und Tee anbieten.
translations.en: We would like to offer coffee and tea.
translations.es: Nos gustaría ofrecer café y té.
translations.fr: Nous vous proposons du café et du thé.
translations.ru: Мы хотим предложить кофе и чай.
translations.pt: Gostaríamos de oferecer café e chá.
translations.tr: Kahve ve çay ikram etmek istiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn mời cà phê và trà.
translations.nl: We willen koffie en thee aanbieden.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо запропонувати каву та чай.
translations.hi: हम कॉफ़ी और चाय पेश करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να προσφέρουμε καφέ και τσάι.
translations.nb: Vi vil tilby kaffe og te.
translations.id: Kami ingin menawarkan kopi dan teh.
translations.sv: Vi vill erbjuda kaffe och te.
translations.ro: Vrem să oferim cafea și ceai.
translations.da: Vi vil gerne tilbyde kaffe og te.
translations.ja: コーヒーとお茶をお出ししたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person plural, present Konjunktiv II (polite desire); selects 'anbieten'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'anbieten' (accusative).
Coordinating conjunction linking the two object nouns 'Kaffee' and 'Tee'.
Common noun, masculine; second coordinated direct object of 'anbieten' (accusative).
Main verb, infinitive; separable verb, attached form due to infinitive with modal.

sentences.target: Der Markt will frisches Obst anbieten.

translations.de: Der Markt will frisches Obst anbieten.
translations.en: The market wants to offer fresh fruit.
translations.es: El mercado quiere ofrecer fruta fresca.
translations.fr: Le marché veut proposer des fruits frais.
translations.it: Il mercato vuole offrire frutta fresca.
translations.ko: 시장은 신선한 과일을 팔고 싶어 해요.
translations.pt: O mercado quer oferecer frutas frescas.
translations.vi: Chợ muốn bán trái cây tươi.
translations.ar: السوق يريد أن يبيع فواكه طازجة.
translations.nl: De markt wil vers fruit aanbieden.
translations.hu: A piac friss gyümölcsöt szeretne kínálni.
translations.hi: बाज़ार ताज़ा फल पेश करना चाहता है.
translations.el: Η αγορά θέλει να προσφέρει φρέσκα φρούτα.
translations.ro: Piața vrea să ofere fructe proaspete.
translations.ja: 市場は新鮮な果物を売りたいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner for 'Markt' (subject).
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular, present indicative; selects 'anbieten'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Obst'; accusative singular neuter with strong ending -es.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'anbieten'.
Main verb, infinitive; separable verb, attached in infinitive position under modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Der Kellner möchte Ihnen einen Platz anbieten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkɛlnɐ ˈmœçtə ˈiːnən ˈaɪ̯nən plats ˈanˌbiːtən/

translations.de: Der Kellner möchte Ihnen einen Platz anbieten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkɛlnɐ ˈmœçtə ˈiːnən ˈaɪ̯nən plats ˈanˌbiːtən/
translations.en: The waiter would like to offer you a seat.
translations.es: El camarero quiere ofrecerle un asiento.
translations.fr: Le serveur voudrait vous proposer une place.
translations.it: Il cameriere vorrebbe offrirle un posto.
translations.ko: 웨이터가 자리를 안내해 드리고 싶어 합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 服务员想为您安排座位。
translations.ru: Официант хотел бы предложить вам место.
translations.pt: O garçom gostaria de lhe oferecer um lugar.
translations.tr: Garson size bir yer teklif etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Người phục vụ muốn mời bạn ngồi.
translations.ar: النادل يود أن يعرض عليك مقعدًا.
translations.nl: De ober wil u een plaats aanbieden.
translations.uk: Офіціант хотів би запропонувати вам місце.
translations.hu: A pincér helyet szeretne kínálni önnek.
translations.hi: वेटर आपको बैठने की जगह देना चाहता है.
translations.el: Ο σερβιτόρος θα ήθελε να σας προσφέρει μια θέση.
translations.nb: Servitøren vil gjerne tilby deg en plass.
translations.id: Pelayan ingin menawarkan Anda tempat duduk.
translations.sv: Servitören vill erbjuda dig en plats.
translations.ro: Chelnerul ar dori să vă ofere un loc.
translations.cs: Číšník by vám rád nabídl místo.
translations.da: Tjeneren vil gerne tilbyde dig en plads.
translations.ja: 店員はあなたに席をご案内したいです。
